reviews.review_description:
to start, the infinitely light cardboard weapons just do not cut it anymore. For a knife or pistol its ok, but after bonelab i can never go back. But that is only the beginning.

 the biggest issue Over EVERYTHING else is clarity. The menu, the battle, the enemy hitboxes, your health. Nothing is clear, nor are you given any real options to fix it. In vr, you absolutely must offer remappable controls and alt control schemes minimum, but this game needs a configurable health bar and various indicators.

i should be able to sense exactly when, where, how, and from what direction i just got injured. The animations should show with glow effects or something exactly how close i can get. Going one inch towards a stationary spear without touching should not be a 1 hit KO.

But the massively overreaching hitboxes and lack of clarity on how to parry is what finally made me delete the game. I LOVE brutal games. Metroid 4 and ultrakill on hard mode were incredible. But when everything around you is a badly animated smoothly moving thing with no defined edges or sounds to make it stand out, this is just not fun.

Tldr: show every little action with a CLEAR visual and sound, and also boost movement speed and slow down weapon rates, and it could be pretty engaging. 

but as it is the slow souls type is just not built for this game.

to end on a positive note though, the visual design of the enemies and weapons as well as the story are very compelling and are what i saw when i bought it. 
Except it is from japan, so i guess you are legally required to dehumanize women? so goddess forbid the women have protected legs. That one kinda kills ur credibility. But, still, misogyny aside, those enemies are SO cool.

To complete the "Soul Convenant" level 10，I need 3 teammates. Sarah's sacrificial weapon level must be at least 30. The cost is 70 dollars per person. I'll pay immediately upon completion. First come, first served.

Please remake soul sacrifice bring it to VR and the new switch! 

If you guys didn’t know, these are the creators of sacrifice on the vita. 

so far, I like everything in this game. I can’t believe people are not buying at this insane discount.. I’ll update with the in debt review once I complete. Developers, please send the word and respond.
This is a 10000/10 game the story is awesome the weapons are godly I wish there were more weapons but it’s still a really good game

reviews.review_title: Lots of good ideas, but too formulaic...
reviews.review_description:
This game does a lot of things I like and has a lot of great ideas. I love the Scapegoats and their double handed forms, the really cool arm cannon super attack, the shield where you hold out your hand like a Final Fantasy character, the way the weapons feel, genuinely fun things are here... but the biggest issue I noticed with it was its formula... it's always a movie, a level where you protect a base, and then another movie, rinse and repeat with the exception of a boss fight with a time limit that you can't see (unless I somehow missed it or couldn't see it?) I really don't want to be too harsh on this game, because I can tell they were really trying with this one... I think it just needed less emphasis on dialogue and story and maybe just give the player a handful of maybe a big arena with waves rather than defending a base, or a maze to explore with a beginning and end, just more variety and less waiting. The whole "tap on the left side of your head to start" was actually really cool, but they spend so much time on the story and dialogue that the gameplay ends up becoming to few and far between each cutscene, and you end up just waiting and waiting a LOT. 
In short... a recipe for a great game is here, but I would say try to go easy on story elements and try to give the player more kinds of missions that aren't just defending a tower all the time or defeating a boss under a time limit. It has so many good elements, but the execution just left me feeling like the game was holding back and I wanted more out of it.

This game is mainly a visual novel with minimal interaction.  it's mainly story and hack and slash play in-between. The game so far is not worth more then 25 dollars. it's currently 39.99 so if you do play catch it on sale or use the discount code. I was looking forward to a game with the visuals but a mobile flat game has more going on then this. it prob would have been better to make it a mobile like game that had more story added on over time.  I hope the devs either rework this or if they do another version that it's not more cut scenes and novel then action and gameplay.  You can see my frustration in the video saogalaxyvr on yt.

There's no exploration in this title, the graphics are on par with the PS2 so not that great. I bought this game after reading the reviews but the game is under whelming. I was expecting this to be like After The Fall or even better than that but it isn't by a long shot. Do not be deceived by the art work and in game thumb nails. The game itself is an arena type game and the scenes don't change much. You can play in co-op but after a while, each level feels and looks the same as the last. The enemies and bosses have no weight to them. It is not worth the asking price of £34.99. The price should be more like £7.99 at best. I thought I'd give a realistic review of the game and it is very disappointing. The devs could have done more with this title and given the gamer more to do and made the game more slicker and playable for the asking price.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback! The devs made this game with the purpose of making the player "feel like a hero", and so added a lot of fun mechanics like weapon transformation or collecting Monad crystals by extending your arm. The game did not speak to at a gameplay level, but we really hope that story, characters and music left something. Even if it wasn't your cup of tea, thank you for playing SOUL COVENANT.

reviews.review_description: Arcade Cyberpunk RPG.

Don't believe the 5 star reviews, created just to make you use the referral link. These reviews should be deleted and users banned for false advertising.

it's a narrative-driven arena hack n slash but the story is boring, told in an overly intrusive way. In almost 2 hours of play I spent 1 hour and 50 minutes listening to stories, watching cinematics and skipping dialogues between teammates who continuously spoke in my ears with phrases of a tough character from fourth-rate films and what's worse is that every every time someone speaks, their thumbnail appears exactly in the center of the screen complete with subtitles that cover a good part of the view and you have to press a button to skip it. The problem is that all of this happens in the middle of monster and boss fights.

Each arena is preceded and followed by a mandatory "diary", although it can be skipped, but you still have to start it to proceed. all this translates into a continuous succession of loading that just waste a lot of time doing nothing and when you finally manage to enter an arena to fight, it all lasts just a few minutes.

The whole game is based on this: dialogues, loading, short fights and intrusive conversations that constantly interrupt the gameplay. which is really annoying.

As for the game, it's not even fun. The combat mechanics are painful, all you have to do is hold the weapon and slash up and down, without timing, without having to block or dodge. There is the possibility of parrying and dodging but just move the hand with the weapon up and quickly to defeat any enemy easily and without necessarily having to use other techniques, such as the block or the demonic burst.

very high price for the experience it offers. shameful.
I love this game thank you thirdverse. Anime devil may cry vr with huge boss battles
I was a huuuge fan of Soul Sacrifice back in the day, when I found out they were making a similar one for VR, I knew I had to download it
Just finished the tutorial. It's very fun and I can't wait to see what other transforming weapons can be found in the next missions!
I've never played any JRPG game before, and my friends recomennded me this one and I gotta admit - I'm impressed!

If you are looking for a JRPG and haven't found anything yet, you gotta try this one. I did, and the VR experience when playing it is way more different and exciting that playing it on other platforms.
Highly anticipated, Soul Covenant's release lived up to expectations. Smooth VR mechanics bring combat to life, making it essential for VR fans.

Prepare to be immersed in the heart-wrenching story of Soul Covenant, set among the ruins of post-apocalyptic Google Tokyo. The hack and slash combat is intense and exhilarating, as you battle against advanced AI enemies in a fight for survival!
As a main of JRPG, Soul Covenant hits all the right notes. Its deep storytelling, rich characters, and immersive world make it a standout in the genre
Soul Covenant sets a new standard for VR gaming. Its emotional, storytelling and intense combat makes it unforgettable! <3
Looks very promising from the first few hours of gameplay. I really needed a fun post-apocalypse VR game for my collection!
Seeing post-apocalyptic Tokyo through VR lenses left me in awe. Combine that with the brutal combat and we have an amazing game
Amazing trailer, amazing gameplay. Everything is on point!
Once you deeply understand the story, you'll get very emotional. TRUST ME
Interesting take with the rebirth system. Getting better after death, gives a fun spin on the genre.

reviews.review_title: Bad game with fake positive reviews
reviews.review_description: Don't waste your money

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We are sorry the game is not speaking to you. Our developers put a lot of effort in crafting a memorable narrative experience and fun combat mechanics in VR. We really hope in the future you will give the game another shot. All the best!

reviews.review_description: Sound design is very immersive. Creative use of the headset audio. I'm impressed!
Glad to see the next instalment of an old favorite, and in VR, same hack and slash, future Tokyo, all things I like
Soul Covenant is more than just a VR game - it's an emotional rollercoaster set in the hauntingly beautiful ruins of post-apocalyptic TokyoA
Futuristic tech, lots of awesome VFX, and brutal combat? Yes please!
It's been a long time since I was this obsessed with a game. Didn't expect that! <3
When getting into a boss fight, you know you're in for a good time!
Movement mechanics are flawless, same for animation and VFX. VR enhances them even further!
With death and rebirth shaping, every decision you make carries weight in this game XD
For all the JRPG fans out there, this game is STUNNING!
If you have a VR kit, you gotta try this one
it's a 10/10
The tutorial was very fun and action-packed. Can't wait to see the rest of the game!
Fun times!
I don't want to stop playing, it was so much fun smashing robots!
Give it a try and you'll see
BIG fan
It's so fun
Moving story
Reminds me of old mech games I used to play with my dad, but in a modern way. Good work!
futuristic Tokyo is so much fun! The two-handed weapons are even cooler.
one of the greatest purchases i've ever made :)
It's a thrilling ride from the start, hack and slash robots, besides its story, it's a good stress reliever.
Very enjoyable!
I was totally hooked on Soul Sacrifice, but now, being a robot warrior in VR is the best thing ever!
Awsome VR JRPG!!
The quick, get in, kill bots, get out style of missions is the perfect mix of entertaining and rewarding!
From cool transforming bone-weapons to energy rays from your palms or the "honeycomb" shield. It's a visual masterpiece

It's like stepping into a classic anime but you're the hero with all the cool abilities! The fights are so cool, especially in VR!
just played it! great gameplay

it's worth every penny!
Enemy design blends perfectly with gameplay. I recommended it to my buddies!
The character and tool design is out of this world, simply put, coolness at your fingertips!
I was actually captivated by the story and theme of the game. The perfect mix of dark and beautiful. I
